original_statement: "Brazil [have a] ... 6.6% [chance of] winning the tournament [according to the Opta supercomputer for the 2026 FIFA World Cup]."
statement_context: Excerpt from Opta supercomputer tournament simulation analysis published by The Analyst on 2026-06-01. Author Dan Edwards using 10,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: Brazil wins the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by lifting the official trophy in the final match on or before 2026-07-19 according to FIFA.
